statements.sql: SELECT snapshot_id, schema_version FROM ducklake_snapshot WHERE snapshot_id = $1
SELECT schema_id, schema_name FROM ducklake_schema WHERE begin_snapshot <= $1 AND (end_snapshot IS NULL OR end_snapshot > $1)
SELECT table_id, schema_id, table_name FROM ducklake_table WHERE begin_snapshot <= $1 AND (end_snapshot IS NULL OR end_snapshot > $1)
SELECT column_id, table_id, column_name, data_type, column_index, is_nullable FROM ducklake_column WHERE begin_snapshot <= $1 AND (end_snapshot IS NULL OR end_snapshot > $1) AND table_id = $2

SELECT data_file_id, table_id, path, file_format, row_count, file_size_bytes, snapshot_id FROM ducklake_data_file WHERE begin_snapshot <= $1 AND (end_snapshot IS NULL OR end_snapshot > $1) AND table_id = $2
SELECT value FROM ducklake_metadata WHERE scope = $1 AND key = $2
INSERT INTO ducklake_snapshot (snapshot_id, author, message) VALUES ($1, $2, $3)
INSERT INTO ducklake_schema (schema_id, schema_name, begin_snapshot) VALUES ($1, $2, $3)
INSERT INTO ducklake_table (table_id, schema_id, table_name, begin_snapshot) VALUES ($1, $2, $3, $4)
INSERT INTO ducklake_column (column_id, table_id, column_name, data_type, column_index, is_nullable, begin_snapshot) VALUES ($1, $2, $3, $4, $5, $6, $7)
